problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Reservoir. Reservoir computing with physical substrate directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
